personalStatement:
I design and deploy end-to-end ML pipelines, translating research insight into robust engineering systems.

I’m drawn to (1) interdisciplinary, (2) edge-case-heavy, and (3) novel problems.
(1) The more, the better. I’ve worked in various domains: healthcare, robotics, transportation, and public sector. I enjoy making new connections across disciplines.
(2) I find it satisfying to build solutions that generalize well in the real world.
(3) Novel problems demand innovation. I enjoy exploring unknowns.

I value work environments that balance collaboration with ownership.
education: Bachelor of Computer Science - University of Waterloo (UW)
llmSkills: Agentic Workflows (LangGraph), LLM applications, Prompt Engineering, RAG, Database-backed Applications
dataSciSkills: End-to-end Model Development & Evaluation, Exploratory Data Analysis, Feature Engineering, Data Visualization, Computer Vision
